questionHtml: Identify, with an arrow labelled B on the diagram, the transition in the hydrogen spectrum that gives rise to the photon with the energy in (a).
markschemeHtml:
–0.605 OR –0.870 OR –1.36 to –5.44 AND arrow pointing downwards ✔

Arrow MUST match calculation in (a)(i)

Allow ECF from (a)(i)
